notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Jac Caglianone singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Julio Rodríguez. Lane Thomas scores. Jac Caglianone to 3rd. Jac Caglianone advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by center fielder Julio Rodríguez.

notableEvents.label: Randy Arozarena GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Randy Arozarena grounds into a double play, pitcher Seth Lugo to second baseman Michael Massey to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino. Josh Naylor out at 2nd. Randy Arozarena out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Seth Lugo. Leo Rivas scores. J.P. Crawford to 3rd. Julio Rodríguez to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Jac Caglianone singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Julio Rodríguez. Lane Thomas scores. Jac Caglianone to 3rd. Jac Caglianone advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by center fielder Julio Rodríguez.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Jac Caglianone singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Julio Rodríguez. Lane Thomas scores. Jac Caglianone to 3rd. Jac Caglianone advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by center fielder Julio Rodríguez.

notableEvents.label: Rob Refsnyder pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Rob Refsnyder grounds out, third baseman Maikel Garcia to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino.

notableEvents.label: Connor Joe pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Connor Joe flies out to right fielder Jac Caglianone.
